ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "area" TEXT /* Name of the area where the property is located */,
  "int_sqft" INTEGER /* Interior square footage of the property */,
  "date_sale" TEXT /* Date of the property sale */,
  "dist_mainroad" INTEGER /* Distance from the main road in meters */,
  "n_bedroom" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "n_bathroom" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "n_room" INTEGER /* Total number of rooms in the property */,
  "sale_cond" TEXT /* Condition of the sale (e.g., AbNormal, Family) */,
  "park_facil" TEXT /* Availability of parking facilities (Yes/No) */,
  "date_build" TEXT /* Date the property was built */,
  "buildtype" TEXT /* Type of building (e.g., Commercial, Others) */,
  "utility_avail" TEXT /* Availability of utilities (e.g., AllPub, ELO, NoSewr) */,
  "street" TEXT /* Type of street (e.g., Paved, Gravel) */,
  "mzzone" TEXT /* Municipal zoning code (e.g., A, RH, RL) */,
  "reg_fee" INTEGER /* Registration fee for the property */,
  "commis" INTEGER /* Commission paid to the real estate agent */,
  "sales_price" INTEGER /* Sales price of the property */,
  "property_type_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the property type */,
  "zoning_code" TEXT /* Municipal zoning code */,
  "renovated" INTEGER /* Indicates if the property has been renovated */,
  "renovation_date" TEXT /* Date of the last renovation */,
  "maintenance_history" TEXT /* History of maintenance activities */,
  "property_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the property */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the property location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the property location */,
  "tax_id" TEXT /* Property tax ID */,
  "tax_amount" INTEGER /* Annual property tax amount */,
  "market_value" INTEGER /* Current market value of the property */,
  "last_market_update" TEXT /* Date of the last market value update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_area FOREIGN KEY ("area") REFERENCES areas ("area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_buildtype FOREIGN KEY ("buildtype") REFERENCES property_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_mzzone FOREIGN KEY ("mzzone") REFERENCES zoning ("zoning_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "areas" (
  "area_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each area */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the area */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the area is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the area is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the area is located */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the area */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code of the area */,
  "median_income" INTEGER /* Median income of the area */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the area */,
  "average_home_price" INTEGER /* Average home price in the area */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Crime rate in the area */,
  "school_rating" REAL /* Average school rating in the area */,
  "public_transport" TEXT /* Availability and quality of public transport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_scores" (
  "quality_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each quality score record */,
  "property_id" TEXT /* ID of the property the scores belong to */,
  "qs_rooms" REAL /* Quality score for the rooms */,
  "qs_bathroom" REAL /* Quality score for the bathrooms */,
  "qs_bedroom" REAL /* Quality score for the bedrooms */,
  "qs_overall" REAL /* Overall quality score of the property */,
  "exterior_quality" REAL /* Quality score for the exterior of the property */,
  "interior_quality" REAL /* Quality score for the interior of the property */,
  "roof_quality" REAL /* Quality score for the roof */,
  "basement_quality" REAL /* Quality score for the basement */,
  "garage_quality" REAL /* Quality score for the garage */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last quality inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_scores_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., agent, manager, client) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed and salted) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* Access level of the user (1 for basic, 2 for advanced, 3 for admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "property_id" TEXT /* ID of the property involved in the transaction */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., sale, purchase) */,
  "amount" INTEGER /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "buyer_id" TEXT /* ID of the buyer */,
  "seller_id" TEXT /* ID of the seller */,
  "agent_id" TEXT /* ID of the real estate agent */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., pending, completed, canceled) */,
  "closing_date" TEXT /* Date of transaction closing */,
  "loan_amount" INTEGER /* Loan amount if applicable */,
  "down_payment" INTEGER /* Down payment amount */,
  "insurance" TEXT /* Insurance details */,
  "legal_fees" INTEGER /* Legal fees associated with the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_seller_id FOREIGN KEY ("seller_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "utilities" (
  "utility_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each utility record */,
  "property_id" TEXT /* ID of the property the utilities belong to */,
  "water" TEXT /* Water supply availability (Yes/No) */,
  "electricity" TEXT /* Electricity supply availability (Yes/No) */,
  "sewer" TEXT /* Sewer system availability (Yes/No) */,
  "gas" TEXT /* Gas supply availability (Yes/No) */,
  "water_source" TEXT /* Source of water supply (e.g., municipal, well) */,
  "electricity_provider" TEXT /* Provider of electricity */,
  "sewer_type" TEXT /* Type of sewer system (e.g., municipal, septic) */,
  "gas_type" TEXT /* Type of gas supply (e.g., natural, propane) */,
  "internet_provider" TEXT /* Internet service provider */,
  "internet_speed" INTEGER /* Internet speed in Mbps */,
  "cable_tv" INTEGER /* Availability of cable TV */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last utility inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("utility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_utilities_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zoning" (
  "zoning_code" TEXT /* Municipal zoning code */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the zoning code */,
  "allowed_uses" TEXT /* Allowed uses for the zoning code */,
  "density" TEXT /* Density classification (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "building_height_limit" INTEGER /* Maximum building height in feet */,
  "setback_requirements" TEXT /* Setback requirements from property lines */,
  "parking_requirements" TEXT /* Parking requirements for the zoning code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zoning_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_types" (
  "type_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each property type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the property type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property type */,
  "max_square_feet" INTEGER /* Maximum allowed square footage for the property type */,
  "min_square_feet" INTEGER /* Minimum allowed square footage for the property type */,
  "allowed_uses" TEXT /* Allowed uses for the property type */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Property tax rate for the property type */,
  "insurance_requirements" TEXT /* Insurance requirements for the property type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)
